'''Wave Works''' was a watery gift shop owned by the [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] [[Jund Voon]], which was part of the [[Fathoms]] resort in [[Wildwater City]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. It sold a wide variety of water sculptures and other hand-crafted items. Unbeknownst to the general public, all of the items were not actually created by Voon, but by a [[Qwohog (species)|Wavedancer]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] named [[Kei No Kay]].<ref name="Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy" />
